TestCase.name: testConditionOnlyUdf
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, b FROM MyTable WHERE pyFunc4(a, c)
LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[pyFunc4($0, $2)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])
Calc(select=[a, b], where=[f0]) +- PythonCalc(select=[a, b, pyFunc4(a, c) AS f0]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testDifferentUdfInConditionAndProjection
TestCase.Resource: SELECT pyFunc1(a, b) FROM MyTable WHERE pyFunc2(a, c) > 0
LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[pyFunc1($0, $1)]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>(pyFunc2($0, $2), 0)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

PythonCalc(select=[pyFunc1(a, b) AS EXPR$0]) +- Calc(select=[a, b], where=[(f0 > 0)]) +- PythonCalc(select=[a, b, pyFunc2(a, c) AS f0]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testMultipleUdfsSharedBetweenConditionAndProjection
TestCase.Resource: SELECT pyFunc1(a, b) + pyFunc2(b, c) FROM MyTable WHERE pyFunc1(a, b) > 0 AND pyFunc2(b, c) > 0

LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[+(pyFunc1($0, $1), pyFunc2($1, $2))]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[AND(>(pyFunc1($0, $1), 0), >(pyFunc2($1, $2), 0))]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

Calc(select=[(f0 + f1) AS EXPR$0], where=[((f0 > 0) AND (f1 > 0))]) +- PythonCalc(select=[a, b, c, pyFunc1(a, b) AS f0, pyFunc2(b, c) AS f1]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testNestedUdfInProjectionWithSameInCondition
TestCase.Resource: SELECT pyFunc2(pyFunc1(a, b), c), pyFunc1(a, b) FROM MyTable WHERE pyFunc1(a, b) > 0

LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[pyFunc2(pyFunc1($0, $1), $2)], EXPR$1=[pyFunc1($0, $1)]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>(pyFunc1($0, $1), 0)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

Calc(select=[f00 AS EXPR$0, f0 AS EXPR$1]) +- PythonCalc(select=[f0, pyFunc2(f0, c) AS f00]) +- Calc(select=[f0, c], where=[(f0 > 0)]) +- PythonCalc(select=[a, b, c, pyFunc1(a, b) AS f0]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testNestedUdfWithCseAnnotation
TestCase.Resource: SELECT pyFunc1(a, b), pyFunc1(pyFunc1(a, b), c), pyFunc1(pyFunc1(pyFunc1(a, b), c), a) FROM MyTable WHERE pyFunc1(a, b) > 0

LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[pyFunc1($0, $1)], EXPR$1=[pyFunc1(pyFunc1($0, $1), $2)], EXPR$2=[pyFunc1(pyFunc1(pyFunc1($0, $1), $2), $0)]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>(pyFunc1($0, $1), 0)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

PythonCalc(select=[f0 AS EXPR$0, pyFunc1(f0, c) AS EXPR$1, pyFunc1(pyFunc1(f0, c), a) AS EXPR$2]) (CSE: EXPR$2->EXPR$1) +- Calc(select=[f0, c, a], where=[(f0 > 0)]) +- PythonCalc(select=[a, b, c, pyFunc1(a, b) AS f0]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testRepeatedUdfCallsInProjectionWithCondition
TestCase.Resource: SELECT pyFunc1(a, b) + 1, pyFunc1(a, b) + 2, pyFunc1(a, b) + 3 FROM MyTable WHERE pyFunc1(a, b) > 0

LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[+(pyFunc1($0, $1), 1)], EXPR$1=[+(pyFunc1($0, $1), 2)], EXPR$2=[+(pyFunc1($0, $1), 3)]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>(pyFunc1($0, $1), 0)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

Calc(select=[(f0 + 1) AS EXPR$0, (f0 + 2) AS EXPR$1, (f0 + 3) AS EXPR$2], where=[(f0 > 0)]) +- PythonCalc(select=[a, b, pyFunc1(a, b) AS f0]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testSameUdfInConditionAndProjection
TestCase.Resource: SELECT pyFunc1(a, b) + 1, pyFunc1(a, b) + 2 FROM MyTable WHERE pyFunc1(a, b) > 0

LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[+(pyFunc1($0, $1), 1)], EXPR$1=[+(pyFunc1($0, $1), 2)]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>(pyFunc1($0, $1), 0)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

Calc(select=[(f0 + 1) AS EXPR$0, (f0 + 2) AS EXPR$1], where=[(f0 > 0)]) +- PythonCalc(select=[a, b, pyFunc1(a, b) AS f0]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])
